title: leontodon leyseri
intro: Leontodon leyseri, also known as the autumn hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Leontodon leyseri include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Leontodon leyseri can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, with the roots being the most commonly used part of the plant for medicinal purposes.
